# Processed datasets are generated by scripts/prepare_datasets.py

This folder will contain:

- `sft_train/`, `sft_eval/` — supervised fine-tuning
- `dpo_train/`, `dpo_eval/` — preference optimization
- `grpo_train/`, `grpo_eval/` — GRPO / RLVR prompts + gold answers
- `rl_train.jsonl`, `rl_val.jsonl` — NeMo-RL-compatible exports

Default source dataset: `gsm8k` (local dev).

For Nemotron-scale runs, update `configs/base.yaml`:

```yaml
data:
  dataset_name: nvidia/Nemotron-3-Nano-RL-Training-Blend
  dataset_config: null
```
